EASTERN MEDITERRANEAN SEA.
HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS.
1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS 1330Z TO 1630Z DAILY 13 AND 15 NOV
   AND 0730Z TO 1030Z DAILY 17 AND 19 NOV
   IN AREAS BOUND BY:
   A. 34-25.0N 034-00.0E, 34-29.3N 034-07.0E,
      34-23.0N 034-19.0E, 34-00.0N 034-08.0E,
      34-10.0N 034-00.0E.
   B. 34-20.3N 034-23.0E, 34-13.4N 034-35.4E,
      34-00.0N 034-33.0E, 34-00.0N 034-14.0E.
2. CANCEL THIS MSG 191130Z NOV 12.
